panels.title: At a glance  —  cluster reliability (filter with $namespace; All = cluster-wide)
OOM kills (1h)
panels.description: Linux containers OOM-killed in the last hour (cgroup metric; Windows excluded).

panels.title: Container restarts (1h)
panels.description: Total container restarts in the last hour.

panels.title: Pods not ready
panels.description: Pods whose Ready condition is currently false.

panels.title: Pending pods
panels.description: Pods stuck in Pending (often = unschedulable / waiting on scale-up).

panels.title: Nodes NotReady
panels.description: Cluster-wide — node Ready condition false. Not namespace-scoped.

panels.title: HPAs scaling-limited
panels.description: HPAs pinned at min/max and unable to scale further.

panels.title: Unschedulable pods (CA)
panels.description: From cluster-autoscaler. Sustained >0 = at scaling limit / no capacity. Requires CA scrape.

panels.title: PVCs not Bound
panels.description: PersistentVolumeClaims in Pending / Lost / other non-Bound state.

panels.title: Pod restart rate
panels.description: Restarts/sec by namespace.

panels.title: OOM kills
panels.description: OOM events per 15m window by namespace (Linux).

panels.title: Top restarting containers (1h)
panels.description: Worst restart offenders over the last hour.

panels.title: Pods by phase
panels.description: Pending/Running/Failed/Succeeded/Unknown counts.

panels.title: Node count
panels.description: Watch for sawtooth = node recycling / churn.

panels.title: Nodes created (1h)
panels.description: Nodes that joined in the last hour — high = active recycling/scaling.

panels.title: Cluster-autoscaler nodes vs max
panels.description: CA node counts by state vs the configured ceiling. Requires CA scrape.

panels.title: Node conditions (pressure / not-ready)
panels.description: Any node reporting pressure or NotReady right now.

panels.title: Network health  —  node NICs (errors, drops, throughput, conntrack)
RX/TX errors
panels.description: Linux node NIC error rate (ens5/eth*). Should be flat zero.

panels.title: RX/TX drops
panels.description: Linux node NIC dropped packets/sec.

panels.title: Conntrack table usage
panels.description: conntrack saturation — a classic EKS networking failure mode.

targets.expr: 100 * sum by(nodename)(node_nf_conntrack_entries * on(instance) group_left(nodename) node_uname_info) / sum by(nodename)(node_nf_conntrack_entries_limit * on(instance) group_left(nodename) node_uname_info)

panels.title: Throughput RX
panels.description: Linux node ingress bytes/sec.

panels.title: Throughput TX
panels.description: Linux node egress bytes/sec.

panels.title: Windows NIC errors + discards
panels.description: Windows nodes only (empty on Linux-only clusters).

panels.title: PVC fill %
panels.description: Per-PVC usage. Populates once EBS/EFS PVCs are bound & mounted to running pods.

panels.title: Linux node disk %
panels.description: Root/data filesystem usage per Linux node mountpoint.

panels.title: Windows disk %
panels.description: Windows node logical disks (empty on Linux-only clusters).

panels.title: PV / PVC phase
panels.description: Every PVC and its current phase; non-Bound rows are the ones to chase.

panels.title: DNS health  —  CoreDNS (cluster-wide; requires coredns scrape)
DNS query rate by type
panels.description: CoreDNS request rate by query type.

panels.title: DNS responses by rcode (watch SERVFAIL)
panels.description: SERVFAIL/REFUSED climbing = DNS resolution failures. NXDOMAIN is usually normal app probing.

panels.title: DNS latency p99
panels.description: CoreDNS server-side response latency.

panels.title: Request rate by verb
panels.description: apiserver throughput.

panels.title: API error rate (5xx)
panels.description: Share of apiserver responses that are 5xx.

panels.title: API latency p99 by verb
panels.description: p99 server-side request latency.
